# getIdentifierForUserVisibleFile(at:completionHandler:)

**Type Method**

Returns the identifier and domain for a user-visible URL.

## Declaration

```swift
class func getIdentifierForUserVisibleFile(at url: URL, completionHandler: @escaping (NSFileProviderItemIdentifier?, NSFileProviderDomainIdentifier?, (any Error)?) -> Void)
```

```swift
class func identifierForUserVisibleFile(at url: URL) async throws -> (NSFileProviderItemIdentifier, NSFileProviderDomainIdentifier)
```

## Parameters

- **url**: The URL of the item.
- **completionHandler**: A block that the system calls after it gets the items identifier. It has the following parameters:



## Discussion



If the URL doesn’t refer to an item managed by your File Provider extension, the system returns a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSFileNoSuchFileError-swift.var] error.

## Translating user-visible URLs

- **getUserVisibleURL(for:completionHandler:)**: Returns the user-visible URL for an item.
